title: Counter With Updatable Authority
summary: Implement a simple counter program with initialization, increment, and authority transfer flows.
businessLogic: An authority initializes the counter account.
Only the current authority can increment the counter.
Only the current authority can transfer authority to a new pubkey.

instructions.name: initialize
instructions.description: Initialize the counter account with the signer as authority and a zero value.

instructions.name: increment
instructions.description: Increment the counter only when the signing authority matches the stored authority.

instructions.name: set_authority
instructions.description: Allow the current authority to update the stored authority.

invariants: Counter authority must be stored on initialize.
Unauthorized signers must not increment the counter.
Unauthorized signers must not transfer authority.
